response.step_by_step_log: Scanned the video for vocal music. The video is a game show segment with VTubers. No singing or background music with lyrics was detected throughout the video. Therefore, no lyric searches were performed. The video was broken down into scenes based on the flow of the game show and location changes.
response.global_summary: A 3D animated game show segment featuring VTubers Vestia Zeta, Sakura Miko, and Kureiji Ollie. The characters participate in a quiz, interact with a zombie, and eventually move to a new location. There is no vocal music present in the video.

scenes.description: Introduction of the VTuber characters in a destroyed city setting.
The characters participate in a quiz game, interacting with a mystery box.
Kureiji Ollie appears on a large screen to announce the result of the quiz.
The characters interact with a zombie after the quiz results.
The scene changes to a boxing ring.
Watson Amelia appears to introduce a new test.
